{{Infobox group
| name = Universal Manufacturing
| introduced = The Captain
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Universal Manufacturing is a major galactic corporation and a primary competitor of the [[Vallenar Corporation]]. The organization maintains a significant presence in interstellar shipping and is known for producing various goods, most notably components for starship navigational computers and replicators. The company operates out of [[Zykaros]], a location generally avoided by people due to the corporation's unpleasant reputation. Universal Manufacturing employs specialized personnel, including transmutation specialists and enchanters, to assist in their production processes. The company's leadership includes a skeletal President who maintains security through armed guards, and the organization utilizes advanced technology such as AI-monitored secure cargo transport ships.}}

== The Captain ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Universal Manufacturing]] is one of the [[Vallenar Corporation]]’s biggest rivals.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c5">''The Captain'', chapter 5</ref>}}

== The Pilot ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Universal Manufacturing is a company that seeks to expand its influence across the [[Galactic Union]]. The organization is led by a skeletal President and maintains specialized staff, including transmutation specialists. Additionally, the company possesses its own secure cargo transport ship.}}

{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[President of Universal Manufacturing]] is a skeletal figure.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c2">''The Pilot'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Universal Manufacturing]] is an organization that aims to extend influence throughout the [[Galactic Union]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c2" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Universal Manufacturing]] owns a secure cargo transport ship.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c24">''The Pilot'', chapter 24</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Universal Manufacturing]] is a company.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c24" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Universal Manufacturing]] employs transmutation specialists.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c38">''The Pilot'', chapter 38</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:The Captain]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon groups]]
